violations.text: Raw animal foods (beef and chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bean sprouts) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Inspector observed breaded shrimp being prepped then stored on cardboard box top for previous chicken use.PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Raw animal foods (raw chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the cookline prep unit. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

( Rice and noodles), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of ( PIC ), ( noodles and rice ) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (various produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch.PIC relocated to 3 bay sink to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Wet wiping cloths are not stored in a chemical sanitizer between uses. Wet wiping cloths must be stored in a chemical sanitizer at the appropriate concentration. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the stove hoods have an accumulation of dust and grease . New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
3 dr prep unit located in the kitchen area was not in good repair ambient temperatures 60 degrees Fahrenheit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2023
